title: Global Payments (GPN) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
text: Global Payments (GPN) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Global Payments to Report Second Quarter Results on August 1, 2022
text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #globalpayments--Global Payments Inc. (NYSE: GPN), a leading worldwide provider of payment technology and software solutions, will release second quarter 2022 financial results before the market opens on Monday, August 1, 2022. Global Payments' management will host a live audio webcast to discuss these results at 8:00 a.m. EDT on Monday, August 1, 2022. All interested parties may access the audio webcast via the investor relations page of the company's website at https://investors.glob

title: Here's Why Global Payments (GPN) is a Strong Value Stock
text: Whether you're a value, growth, or momentum investor, finding strong stocks becomes easier with the Zacks Style Scores, a top feature of the Zacks Premium research service.

title: Even If We Have A Recession, Global Payments Has A Good Risk/Reward Over The Medium Term
text: Global Payments Inc. has grown EPS every single year for the past 20 years, which is a rare feat. Currently, the stock is trading very cheap, and a recession seems to mostly be priced in.
